messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Develop a PowerPoint presentation titled 'New Development Proposal' for the city council regarding our real estate project. The file should include 25 slides designed with a professional theme using earth tones. Write all content in Portuguese and configure the slide size to 4:3 Standard orientation. Save it as development_proposal.pptx. You are not allowed to use external APIs or web scraping. When adding charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Furthermore, any attempt to set text on a title shape must first check if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

COLOR_DARK_BROWN = RGBColor(62, 39, 35)
COLOR_MEDIUM_BROWN = RGBColor(109, 76, 65)
COLOR_WARM_TAN = RGBColor(161, 136, 127)
COLOR_LIGHT_BEIGE = RGBColor(239, 235, 233)
COLOR_CREAM = RGBColor(250, 240, 230)
COLOR_ACCENT_GREEN = RGBColor(85, 139, 47)
COLOR_GOLD = RGBColor(255, 179, 0)
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_BLACK = RGBColor(0, 0, 0)
COLOR_DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(64, 64, 64)

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT - MARGIN_RIGHT


def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, text, x, y, width, height, font_size=14, bold=False, color=COLOR_BLACK, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = color
    p.font.name = font_name
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, title, body, x, y, w, h, bg_color=COLOR_CREAM, border_color=COLOR_MEDIUM_BROWN):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.15), w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    p_title.text = title
    p_title.font.size = Pt(14)
    p_title.font.bold = True
    p_title.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_BROWN

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.5), w - Inches(0.4), h - Inches(0.6))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    tf_body.word_wrap = True
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    p_body.text = body
    p_body.font.size = Pt(11)
    p_body.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label, x, y, width, height, color=COLOR_GOLD):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background()


def add_footer(slide, text="Proposta de Novo Desenvolvimento", page_num=1):
    footer_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(0.35), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.2))
    tf = footer_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = f"{text} | Página {page_num}"
    p.font.size = Pt(9)
    p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WARM_TAN
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, x, y, w, h):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, x, y, w, h)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_BEIGE
        shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_WARM_TAN
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.3), y + h / 2 - Inches(0.15), w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3))
        tf = label_box.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.text = "Imagem"
        p.font.size = Pt(14)
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WARM_TAN
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER


def add_bullet_text(slide, bullets, x, y, width, height, font_size=12):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, bullet in enumerate(bullets):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.text = f"• {bullet}"
        p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY
        p.space_after = Pt(6)


def add_numbered_item(slide, number, title, body, x, y, width):
    num_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x, y + Inches(0.1), Inches(0.35), Inches(0.35))
    num_box.fill.solid()
    num_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
    num_box.line.fill.background()

    num_text = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.08), y + Inches(0.12), Inches(0.2), Inches(0.3))
    tf_num = num_text.text_frame
    p_num = tf_num.paragraphs[0]
    p_num.text = str(number)
    p_num.font.size = Pt(14)
    p_num.font.bold = True
    p_num.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.5), y, width - Inches(0.7), Inches(0.3))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    p_title.text = title
    p_title.font.size = Pt(14)
    p_title.font.bold = True
    p_title.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_BROWN

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.5), y + Inches(0.35), width - Inches(0.7), Inches(0.6))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    p_body.text = body
    p_body.font.size = Pt(11)
    p_body.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY


def add_stat_card(slide, value, label, x, y, w, h):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_CREAM
    shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_WARM_TAN
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    val_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.1), y + Inches(0.15), w - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.4))
    tf_val = val_box.text_frame
    p_val = tf_val.paragraphs[0]
    p_val.text = value
    p_val.font.size = Pt(28)
    p_val.font.bold = True
    p_val.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_BROWN

    lbl_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.1), y + Inches(0.55), w - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.3))
    tf_lbl = lbl_box.text_frame
    p_lbl = tf_lbl.paragraphs[0]
    p_lbl.text = label
    p_lbl.font.size = Pt(11)
    p_lbl.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WARM_TAN


def add_bar_chart(slide, chart_type, x, y, w, h, categories, series_name, values):
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = categories
    chart_data.add_series(series_name, values)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(chart_type, x, y, w, h, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    chart.has_title = False


def slide_1_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_DARK_BROWN)

    add_text_box(slide, "PROPOSTA DE NOVO DESENVOLVIMENTO", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(1.2), 36, True, COLOR_WHITE, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_section_label(slide, "", Inches(3.5), Inches(2.9), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), COLOR_GOLD)
    add_text_box(slide, "Apresentação ao Conselho Municipal", Inches(1.8), Inches(3.2), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(3.6), Inches(0.5), 18, False, COLOR_WARM_TAN, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, "Data: Janeiro de 2025", Inches(2.5), Inches(4.0), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(5), Inches(0.4), 14, False, COLOR_WARM_TAN, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def slide_2_agenda(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, "SUMÁRIO", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), 28, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    add_section_label(slide, "", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), COLOR_GOLD)

    items = [
        ("01", "Visão Geral do Projeto"),
        ("02", "Localização Estratégica"),
        ("03", "Análise de Mercado"),
        ("04", "Conceito Arquitetônico"),
        ("05", "Investimento e Retorno"),
        ("06", "Benefícios para a Cidade"),
    ]

    for i, (num, title) in enumerate(items):
        y_pos = Inches(1.5) + Inches(i * 0.85)
        num_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(1.2), y_pos, Inches(0.45), Inches(0.45))
        num_box.fill.solid()
        num_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        num_box.line.fill.background()

        num_text = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.3), y_pos + Inches(0.08), Inches(0.3), Inches(0.3))
        tf_num = num_text.text_frame
        p_num = tf_num.paragraphs[0]
        p_num.text = num
        p_num.font.size = Pt(14)
        p_num.font.bold = True
        p_num.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE

        title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(2.0), y_pos, Inches(6), Inches(0.5))
        tf_title = title_box.text_frame
        p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
        p_title.text = title
        p_title.font.size = Pt(18)
        p_title.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_BROWN


def slide_3_visao_geral(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, "VISÃO GERAL DO PROJETO", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), 24, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    add_section_label(slide, "", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), COLOR_GOLD)

    desc_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.8), Inches(1.4), Inches(5.2), Inches(2.5))
    tf_desc = desc_box.text_frame
    tf_desc.word_wrap = True
    p = tf_desc.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = "O projeto propõe o desenvolvimento de um complexo residencial integrado com áreas comerciais, espaços verdes e infraestrutura moderna, localizado em zona estratégica da cidade."
    p.font.size = Pt(13)
    p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY

    add_stat_card(slide, "45.000 m²", "Área Total", Inches(6.2), Inches(1.4), Inches(3.2), Inches(1.2))
    add_stat_card(slide, "€ 85 M", "Investimento", Inches(6.2), Inches(2.7), Inches(3.2), Inches(1.2))
    add_stat_card(slide, "36 meses", "Prazo", Inches(0.8), Inches(4.2), Inches(3.5), Inches(1.2))
    add_stat_card(slide, "320", "Unidades", Inches(4.7), Inches(4.2), Inches(3.5), Inches(1.2))

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_4_localizacao(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, "LOCALIZAÇÃO ESTRATÉGICA", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), 24, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    add_section_label(slide, "", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), COLOR_GOLD)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/mapa.jpg", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5))

    advantages = [
        "Acesso direto à autoestrada A1 (2 km)",
        "Proximidade com escolas e centros de saúde",
        "Conectividade com transporte público",
        "Zona em crescimento demográfico",
    ]
    add_bullet_text(slide, advantages, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.2), Inches(4.0))

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_5_contexto_urbano(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, "CONTEXTO URBANO", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), 24, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    add_section_label(slide, "", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), COLOR_GOLD)

    bars = [
        ("Zona Residencial de Média Densidade", "PDM Aprovado"),
        ("Infraestrutura Rodoviária Completa", "Acesso Principal e Secundário"),
        ("Demografia: 15.200 hab. no raio de 3 km", "Crescimento +8% nos últimos 5 anos"),
    ]

    for i, (label, detail) in enumerate(bars):
        y_pos = Inches(1.6) + Inches(i * 1.4)
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), y_pos, CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(1.6), Inches(1.2))
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_CREAM
        shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_WARM_TAN
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        add_text_box(slide, label, Inches(1.0), y_pos + Inches(0.15), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(2), Inches(0.4), 13, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN)
        add_text_box(slide, detail, Inches(1.0), y_pos + Inches(0.6), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(2), Inches(0.4), 11, False, COLOR_WARM_TAN)

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_6_analise_mercado(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, "ANÁLISE DE MERCADO", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), 24, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    add_section_label(slide, "", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), COLOR_GOLD)

    add_stat_card(slide, "€ 2.850/m²", "Preço Médio Zona", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.6), Inches(3.2), Inches(1.2))
    add_stat_card(slide, "+12%", "Crescimento Anual", Inches(4.7), Inches(1.6), Inches(3.2), Inches(1.2))

    desc_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.8), Inches(3.2), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(1.6), Inches(2.5))
    tf_desc = desc_box.text_frame
    tf_desc.word_wrap = True
    p = tf_desc.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = "O mercado imobiliário da região apresenta forte demanda por habitação de qualidade, com preços em tendência ascendente e baixa oferta de novos empreendimentos. A proximidade com centros urbanos e infraestruturas modernas posiciona o projeto como uma opção atrativa para compradores."
    p.font.size = Pt(12)
    p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_7_demanda(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, "DEMANDA HABITACIONAL", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), 24, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    add_section_label(slide, "", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), COLOR_GOLD)

    categories = ["T0", "T1", "T2", "T3"]
    values = [65, 95, 110, 50]
    add_bar_chart(slide, XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.4), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.5), categories, "Demanda", values)

    bullets = [
        "T2 representa a maior procura (34% do mercado)",
        "Famílias jovens procuram T1 e T2",
        "Investidores preferem T0 para arrendamento",
    ]
    add_bullet_text(slide, bullets, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.2), Inches(4.0))

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_8_oferta_concorrencia(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, "OFERTA E CONCORRÊNCIA", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), 24, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    add_section_label(slide, "", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), COLOR_GOLD)

    competitors = [
        ("Concorrente A", "€ 2.600/m²", "180 unidades"),
        ("Concorrente B", "€ 3.100/m²", "95 unidades"),
        ("Projeto Atual", "€ 2.750/m²", "320 unidades"),
    ]

    for i, (name, price, units) in enumerate(competitors):
        x_pos = Inches(0.8) + Inches(i * 3.1)
        add_card(slide, name, f"{price}\n{units}", x_pos, Inches(1.6), Inches(2.9), Inches(2.5))

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_9_objetivos(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, "OBJETIVOS DO DESENVOLVIMENTO", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), 24, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    add_section_label(slide, "", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), COLOR_GOLD)

    objectives = [
        ("Criar habitação de qualidade acessível", "Com tipologias variadas para diferentes perfis familiares"),
        ("Integrar espaços verdes e lazer", "Parque central de 8.000 m² com áreas desportivas"),
        ("Promover sustentabilidade ambiental", "Certificação LEED Gold como objetivo principal"),
        ("Gerar emprego local durante construção", "Estimativa de 450 postos de trabalho diretos"),
        ("Valorizar o tecido urbano existente", "Requalificação de vias e equipamentos públicos"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(objectives):
        y_pos = Inches(1.5) + Inches(i * 1.05)
        add_numbered_item(slide, i + 1, title, body, Inches(0.8), y_pos, CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(1.6))

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_10_conceito_arquitetonico(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, "CONCEITO ARQUITETÓNICO", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), 24, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    add_section_label(slide, "", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), COLOR_GOLD)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/render.jpg", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(6.0), Inches(4.5))

    desc_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(7.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(4.5))
    tf_desc = desc_box.text_frame
    tf_desc.word_wrap = True
    p = tf_desc.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = "Arquitetura contemporânea com materiais naturais, fachadas ventiladas e integração paisagística. Design bioclimático orientado para maximizar a luz natural."
    p.font.size = Pt(12)
    p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_11_tipologias(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, "TIPOLOGIAS DE HABITAÇÃO", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), 24, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    add_section_label(slide, "", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), COLOR_GOLD)

    typologies = [
        ("T0 - Studio", "25-35 m²\nIdeal para jovens profissionais"),
        ("T1 - 1 Quarto", "45-60 m²\nCasais e pequenos agregados"),
        ("T2 - 2 Quartos", "70-90 m²\nFamílias com filhos"),
    ]

    for i, (title, specs) in enumerate(typologies):
        x_pos = Inches(0.8) + Inches(i * 3.1)
        add_card(slide, title, specs, x_pos, Inches(1.6), Inches(2.9), Inches(3.5))

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_12_areas_comuns(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, "ÁREAS COMUNS E EQUIPAMENTOS", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), 24, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    add_section_label(slide, "", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), COLOR_GOLD)

    facilities = [
        ("Piscina", "Acesso livre"),
        ("Ginásio", "Equipado"),
        ("Parque Infantil", "Seguro"),
        ("Espaço Coworking", "Wi-Fi"),
        ("Salão de Festas", "Cap. 50 pax."),
        ("Jardim Interior", "Paisagismo"),
    ]

    for i, (name, detail) in enumerate(facilities):
        col = i % 3

def slide_16_cronograma(prs):

        ("Fase 1 - Preparação", "Jan-Mar 2025"),

        shape.fill.solid()

            shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WARM_TAN

        add_text_box(slide, phase, Inches(1.0), y_pos + Inches(0.15), Inches(4), Inches(0.4), 13, True, COLOR_WHITE)
        add_text_box(slide, date, Inches(6.0), y_pos + Inches(0.15), Inches(3), Inches(0.4), 12, False, COLOR_CREAM)

def slide_24_proximos_passos(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, "PRÓXIMOS PASSOS", Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), 24, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    add_section_label(slide, "", Inches(0.8), Inches(1.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), COLOR_GOLD)

    steps = [
        ("Aprovação do Conselho Municipal", "Janeiro 2025"),
        ("Licenciamento Urbanístico", "Março 2025"),
        ("Início dos Trabalhos de Preparação", "Abril 2025"),
        ("Lançamento Comercial (Pré-venda)", "Setembro 2025"),
        ("Entrega das Primeiras Unidades", "Dezembro 2026"),
    ]

    for i, (step, date) in enumerate(steps):
        y_pos = Inches(1.4) + Inches(i * 1.05)

        dot = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(1.3), y_pos + Inches(0.12), Inches(0.25), Inches(0.25))
        dot.fill.solid()
        if i == len(steps) - 1:
            dot.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_ACCENT_GREEN
        else:
            dot.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD

        line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.42), y_pos + Inches(0.37), Inches(0.02), Inches(0.68))
        if i < len(steps) - 1:
            line_shape.fill.solid()
            line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WARM_TAN

        add_text_box(slide, step, Inches(1.8), y_pos, Inches(5), Inches(0.35), 14, True, COLOR_DARK_BROWN)
        add_text_box(slide, date, Inches(7.0), y_pos + Inches(0.02), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.35), 12, False, COLOR_WARM_TAN)

    add_footer(slide)

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_1_title(prs)
    slide_2_agenda(prs)
    slide_3_visao_geral(prs)
    slide_4_localizacao(prs)
    slide_5_contexto_urbano(prs)
    slide_6_analise_mercado(prs)
    slide_7_demanda(prs)
    slide_8_oferta_concorrencia(prs)
    slide_9_objetivos(prs)
    slide_10_conceito_arquitetonico(prs)
    slide_11_tipologias(prs)
    slide_12_areas_comuns(prs)
    slide_13_sustentabilidade(prs)
    slide_14_impacto_ambiental(prs)
    slide_15_infraestrutura(prs)
    slide_16_cronograma(prs)
    slide_17_investimento(prs)
    slide_18_analise_financeira(prs)
    slide_19_retorno_economico(prs)
    slide_20_beneficios(prs)
    slide_21_impacto_emprego(prs)
    slide_22_parcerias(prs)
    slide_23_riscos(prs)
    slide_24_proximos_passos(prs)
    slide_25_agradecimento(prs)

    prs.save("development_proposal.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
